title: BlueMap Banners
description: Gives players the ability to add named banners to BlueMap. Customizable!
body:
Let your players add banners to your BlueMap!
Banners can be added by naming them in an anvil then placing them where youd like the marker to be!

Default Config:
```yml
#################################################
# BlueMap Banners configuration                 #
#################################################

# Use %banner% and %players% to replace with respective names
markers:
  label: "%banner%"
  detail: "%banner%\n - %player%"
  hidden: false

# Use %banner% to replace with banner name
messages:
  enabled: true
  +marker: "%banner% added to BlueMap!"
  -marker: "%banner% removed from BlueMap!"
  explode: "The %banner% banner exploded!"
```
Config will reload along with `/bluemap reload`

### Planned Features (Maybe)
- Banner ownership (cannot break banner unless owner)
- Banner limits per player
- Admin bypass permission for ownership and/or limits
- Customize banner min and max distance visible
- Banner name blacklist
